query:
SELECT 
  'payment_transactions' AS source,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'debt_collected_cache (total_amount + bad_debt)' AS source,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) END) AS total
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'debt_collected_cache (breakdown - discount)' AS source,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  SUM(
    CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2)) + 
    CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - 
    CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ) AS total
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';
